# Tom Lotozo — Film Portrait Photographer

Tom Lotozo is a film portrait photographer based in Columbus, Ohio (Upper Arlington native). He shoots outdoor portrait sessions on 35mm analog film using natural light.

## Services & Pricing

- **Portrait Session: $500**
  - 1 hour of shooting
  - 2 rolls of 35mm film (~72 frames)
  - Professional lab development at Midwest Photo, Columbus
  - High-resolution scanned digital images
  - Delivered within approximately 2 weeks
  - Outdoor locations in Columbus and Central Ohio

- **Extended Sessions:** Custom pricing — email to inquire

- **Fine Art Prints:** Available made to order from film originals

## How to Book

Email: lotozot@gmail.com
Subject: Portrait Session Inquiry

## Locations Served

Columbus, Ohio and Central Ohio. Favorite shooting locations include:
- Hayden Falls Park (Columbus)
- Griggs Reservoir / Quarry Rock (Columbus)
- Schiller Park / Merion Village (Columbus)
- Indian Run Falls (Dublin, OH)
- Blendon Woods Metro Park (Columbus)
- Hocking Hills State Park (~1 hour south of Columbus)
- Upper Arlington, OH

## About Tom

- Based in Columbus, Ohio (Upper Arlington)
- 5+ years shooting on film
- Cameras: Nikon FE (35mm), Holga (medium format), Polaroid
- Film stocks: Kodak Portra 400, Kodak Gold, Kodak Ektar, Ilford HP5
- Lab: Midwest Photo, Columbus, Ohio
- Prefers golden hour / evening natural light
- Instagram: @tibetanplatoz

## What Makes Tom Different

Tom shoots almost entirely on analog film. Every session is outdoors using only natural light — no flash, no artificial lighting. The grain, color rendering, and tonal quality of 35mm film produces portraits that feel different from digital — images you actually want to print and hang.

## Website

https://www.josephalotozo.com/tom/
